docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BELARA, MARILYN AS TO DEFENDANT HIGUERA, EDWARD PIKE, BETTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
